rationale: Educ. Code §39.0304 governs training for school district employees administering student assessment instruments. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or appraised value limits.
quote: To ensure that each administration of assessment instruments under Section 39.023 is valid, reliable, and in compliance with the requirements of this subchapter, the commissioner may require training for school district employees involved in the administration of the assessment instruments
_note: No conflict: the rule_text concerns assessment instrument training and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
